# HexParse Highlight

VS Code extension for [HexParse](https://github.com/YukkuriC/HexParseMod) script language -- syntax highlighting, code completion, hover info, diagnostics, and snippets.

## Features

- **Syntax Highlighting** -- full colorization for `.hexParse` / `.hexparse` files
- **LSP Support** -- completion, hover documentation, and diagnostic validation
- **Snippets** -- quick-insert templates for common patterns

## File Associations

| Extension | Language |
|-----------|----------|
| `.hexParse` | HexParse |
| `.hexparse` | HexParse |

## Related

- [HexParse Mod](https://github.com/YukkuriC/HexParseMod) -- the Minecraft mod this extension supports
- [Syntax Reference](https://github.com/YukkuriC/HexParseMod/blob/main/SYNTAX.md)
